revision.text:
'''荒神神社'''（あらがみじんじゃ、こうじんじんじゃ）は[[神社]]。
*[[荒神神社 (遠野市)]] - 岩手県遠野市鎮座 *[[荒神神社 (藤沢市)]] - 神奈川県藤沢市鎮座
{{曖昧さ回避}} [[Category:神社|あらかみしんしや]]

'''Kōjin Shrine''' (荒神神社, also pronounced Arakami Jinja or Kōjin Jinja) refers to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]].

* {{ill|Kōjin Shrine (Tōno)|ja|荒神神社 (遠野市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjin Shrine (Tōno)|qq=}} (Arakami Jinja) - Located in [[:en:Tōno, Iwate|Tōno, Iwate]], [[:en:Iwate Prefecture|Iwate Prefecture]].
* {{ill|Kōjin Shrine (Fujisawa)|ja|荒神神社 (藤沢市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjin Shrine (Fujisawa)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Kōjin Jinja) - Located in [[:en:Fujisawa, Kanagawa|Fujisawa, Kanagawa]], [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]].
